item.title: Mint Mobile slashes $500 OFF the Google Pixel 10 in new deal, plus get 50% off your phone bill for a year — I'm serious

item.itunes:author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)

item.content:encoded: Need a new phone plan? Mint Mobile will give you $500 off the Pixel 10 when you bundle with a year of discounted wireless.

item.content:encoded: Add a line with ANY unlimited plan and T-Mobile will give you a Google Pixel 10a for only $3.99/month.

item.content:encoded: Google Pay in India has a hidden feature that lets you add all credit card billers, allowing you to pay bills with the utility. This is the CRED alternative I've been waiting for in India.

item.title: The Pixel 11 may look exactly how I expected it would—that's not a bad thing
item.itunes:title: The Pixel 11 may look exactly how I expected it would—that's not a bad thing
item.itunes:author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.itunes:summary: Pixel 11 expectations started coming to the forefront with a set of alleged renderings ahead of a (hopeful) summer launch.
item.description: Pixel 11 expectations started coming to the forefront with a set of alleged renderings ahead of a (hopeful) summer launch.
item.content:encoded: Pixel 11 expectations started coming to the forefront with a set of alleged renderings ahead of a (hopeful) summer launch.

item.title: After testing the new Sony WF-1000XM6, I'm convinced they're the only earbuds you need for great sound and excellent ANC
item.itunes:title: After testing the new Sony WF-1000XM6, I'm convinced they're the only earbuds you need for great sound and excellent ANC
item.itunes:author: klpmediallc@gmail.com (Tshaka Armstrong)
item.itunes:summary: Sony's WF-1000XM6 earbuds are their best yet, and the best ANC earbuds on the market right now.
item.description: Sony's WF-1000XM6 earbuds are their best yet, and the best ANC earbuds on the market right now.
item.content:encoded: Sony's WF-1000XM6 earbuds are their best yet, and the best ANC earbuds on the market right now.

item.title: Feeling carsick? Samsung thinks your earbuds can help
item.itunes:title: Feeling carsick? Samsung thinks your earbuds can help
item.itunes:author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.itunes:summary: Samsung’s Hearapy app wants to replace your motion sickness pills with pure bass.
item.description: Samsung’s Hearapy app wants to replace your motion sickness pills with pure bass.
item.content:encoded: Samsung’s Hearapy app wants to replace your motion sickness pills with pure bass.

item.title: The 'best budget' Fitbit Inspire 3 just scored an additional 30% off during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.itunes:title: The 'best budget' Fitbit Inspire 3 just scored an additional 30% off during Amazon's Big Spring Sale
item.itunes:author: Android Central[RSS+]
item.itunes:summary: The Fitbit Inspire 3 is already a great budget Fitbit. $30 off doesn't hurt either.
item.description: The Fitbit Inspire 3 is already a great budget Fitbit. $30 off doesn't hurt either.
item.content:encoded: The Fitbit Inspire 3 is already a great budget Fitbit. $30 off doesn't hurt either.
